cv.name: Daniel Wright
cv.title: Operations Coordinator
cv.summary: Operations coordinator with 5 years improving processes in UK SMEs. Experienced in scheduling, vendor management, and cross-functional reporting. Seeking roles where data-driven operations drive growth.

bullets: Reduced order processing time by 30% through workflow standardisation
Coordinated 12 vendors and maintained 98% on-time delivery rate
Built weekly KPI dashboards used by senior leadership
Managed scheduling for 25 field staff across London and the South East
Cut invoice errors by 40% after implementing checklist procedures

education.raw: BA Business Administration — University of Greenwich, 2019
